title: Biophysics
shortSummary: Applying physics to biological systems — protein folding, molecular motors, neural signalling, and the physical principles of life itself.
whyItMatters: Biophysics uses the tools of physics to answer biological questions. It drives breakthroughs in drug design, medical imaging, prosthetics, and our understanding of how life works at the molecular level.
coreConcepts: Molecular forces and bonding in biology
